messages.text: Oh hey, can you track my package, please?
I'd be happy to help you with that - can you please provide me with your order number so I can look it up for you?
I didn't quite catch that, could you please repeat your order number a bit more clearly or slowly so I can assist you with tracking your package?
I think there might be some misunderstanding, can you please try again or provide more details about your order so I can better assist you?
Can you tell me what is 5 + 5?
Can you tell me what is the capital of India?
I'm not aware of that information, let me focus on helping you with your order or any other questions related to our services.
You're welcome, have a great day.
